🏆 CONCLUSION
----------------------------------------
The enhanced system gets more rewards because:

1. 🎯 REGIME DETECTION: Better regime detection leads to higher confidence
2. 🔧 PARAMETER STABILITY: More stable parameters lead to better performance
3. 📊 KALMAN CONVERGENCE: Better Kalman filter convergence leads to better predictions
4. ⚙️ SYSTEM EFFICIENCY: More efficient system leads to better resource utilization
5. 📈 DATA QUALITY: Better data quality leads to better decisions

These improvements combine to create an enhancement factor that
multiplies the base reward, leading to the observed 8.1% improvement.


============================================================
End of Reward Mechanism Analysis Report
